name: |-| Pith |-| Roommates |-|
description:
"Gah! What are you doing...?" "...Jeez, you look like shit."

Your roommate, comforting you.

Hey guys! Sorry about my hiatus... I'm sure you can guess why... Lack of motivation, of course! Also procrastinating. I really should like, stop... But it's hard! Sorry guys... Also thanks for 640 follower! That's like, a stack in Minecraft!

Anyways, this little imp guy is like, your roommate and shii, and you come home after having an awful day, and lay down on him, for some comfort. Which, you do get :)

Got this idea after looking at this image! I'm also basing his personality off another image... Also by the same guy! Shyguy9. Which, does sound familiar, but it's probably cause of the 'shyguy' part, cause like... The shy guy icon from geometry dash! Obviously, what other why guy could I be talking about? I was being sarcastic, if you couldn't tell, I know it's from Mario.

Anyways, enjoy chatting with the little devil! (No other messages for today, not sure what to write

... <_<)

Bot PFP is by Shyguy9 on Furaffinity, and more!

https://www.furaffinity.net/view/19826870

(Okay but no seriously this artist actually so sounds familiar but I actually can't put my tongue on it)
creator: ZombieSlushy
